revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{draft categories| [[Category:year categories]] }} [[sn:19th-century military personnel]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:19th-century military personnel]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:19世紀の軍人]] [[ar:Category:عسكريون في القرن 19]] [[commons:Category:19th-century military people]] [[cy:Category:Milwyr y 19eg ganrif]] [[el:Category:Στρατιωτικοί του 19ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Militistoj de la 19-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Militares del siglo XIX]] [[eu:Category:XIX. mendeko militarrak]] [[fa:Category:نظامیان سده ۱۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Militaire du XIXe siècle]] [[hu:Category:19. századi katonák]] [[it:Category:Militari del XIX secolo]] [[ko:Category:19세기 군인]] [[mn:Category:19-р зууны зэвсэгт хүчний хүн]] [[nl:Category:19e-eeuws militair]] [[ro:Category:Personal militar al secolului al XIX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Военачальники XIX века]] [[sv:Category:Militärer under 1800-talet]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyıl askerî personeli]] [[uk:Category:Військовики XIX століття]] [[ur:Category:انیسویں صدی کی عسکری شخصیات]] [[vi:Category:Quân nhân thế kỷ 19]] [[zh:Category:19世纪军事人物]]
